reference: It is a hemarthrosis, which means blood has collected in the knee joint. Go immediately to an orthopedic surgeon. Get a knee X-ray first to rule out fractures. If the X-ray is normal, get a knee aspiration of the blood done and follow your surgeon's advice. Thank you.
text: It is a hemarthrosis, which means blood has collected in the knee joint. Go immediately to an orthopedic surgeon. Get a knee x-ray first to rule out fractures. If the x-ray is wrong, get any aspiration of the blood done and follow your surgeon's advice. Thank you.
